description_long: This object is a modern Huawei smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The back is glossy black, featuring a prominent circular camera module with the Leica branding and a centered Huawei logo below. The front display is large, nearly bezel-less, and shows a vibrant wallpaper with a digital clock and some notification icons at the top. The sides are slim, with visible buttons on the right edge, including a red-accented power button. The phone's construction appears to be a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium look and feel. The overall design is minimalist and elegant, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A sleek, black Huawei smartphone with a large, nearly bezel-less display and a circular rear camera module. The device features a glossy finish and minimalist design with visible side buttons.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a glossy black surface, a large circular camera module with Leica branding, and a centered Huawei logo.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the protrusion of the rear camera module.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large screen with a colorful wallpaper, digital clock, and notification icons at the top.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the slim edge and the presence of physical buttons, including a red-accented power button.
attribute_brand_logo: The Huawei logo is centered on the back of the device in white text, below the circular camera module.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock (08:08), Chinese text, a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue and yellow hues, and notification icons at the top.
attribute_camera_placement: A single large circular camera module is centered near the top of the back, with Leica branding in the middle of the circle.
attribute_button_layout: There are physical buttons on the right edge, including a red-accented power button and a volume rocker above it.
